Text.text:
{= (${CustomerData>UnitText} === 'Per Month') ? Number(${CustomerData>TotalMonths}) + ' ' + (Number(${CustomerData>TotalMonths}) === 1 ? 'Month' : 'Months') + (Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) ? ' / ' + Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) + ' Qty' : '')
: (${CustomerData>UnitText} === 'Per Year') ? Number(${CustomerData>TotalYears}) + ' ' + (Number(${CustomerData>TotalYears}) === 1 ? 'Year' : 'Years') + (Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) ? ' / ' + Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) + ' Qty' : '')
: (${CustomerData>UnitText} === 'Per Day') ? Number(${CustomerData>TotalDays}) + ' ' + (Number(${CustomerData>TotalDays}) === 1 ? 'Day' : 'Days') + (Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) ? ' / ' + Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) + ' Qty' : '')
: (${CustomerData>UnitText} === 'Per Hour') ? Number(${CustomerData>TotalHour}) + ' ' + (Number(${CustomerData>TotalHour}) === 1 ? 'Hour' : 'Hours') + (Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) ? ' / ' + Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) + ' Qty' : '')
: Number(${CustomerData>quantity}) + ' Qty' }
